message.content:
Here is the detailed eligibility analysis for **Startup India Seed Fund Scheme (SISFS)** based on your profile:

### 📋 Eligibility Checklist

| Criteria | Requirement | Your Profile | Status |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Startup Stage** | Idea, Prototype, or Early Stage | Early Stage (Pre-revenue) | ✅ **Eligible** |
| **Company Age** | Incorporate < 2 years at application | DPIIT Recognition active | ✅ **Eligible** |
| **Sector** | Tech, Agri, Bio, Deeptech, etc. | Agriculture & DeepTech | ✅ **Eligible** |
| **Location** | Registered in India | Karnataka, India | ✅ **Eligible** |
| **Prior Funding** | Must not have received > ₹10L monetary aid | No prior institutional funding | ✅ **Eligible** |

### 💡 Final Recommendation
You meet all primary criteria for the SISFS program. Your overall match score is **85%**.

Would you like me to help you **draft a proposal** for this opportunity?
